name: Naafiri
playstyleSummary: Naafiri is an assassin who fights alongside a pack of AI-controlled hounds, applying bleed with her daggers and diving onto priority targets with her dash ultimate. She feels aggressive and pack-based - your damage output depends on keeping your packmates alive and pointed at the same target you are.
strengths: Extra damage and pressure from her packmates attacking alongside her
Strong dive and pick potential with Hounds' Pursuit
Eviscerate gives mobility and heals her pack back up between fights
weaknesses: Her all-in pattern is fairly telegraphed once enemies learn it
Squishy like most assassins - dies fast if caught
Packmates die easily to area damage, which cuts into her overall damage
Vulnerable to crowd control that catches her mid-dive

abilities.name: We Are More
abilities.howToUseIt: Your packmates automatically attack whoever you hit with an attack or ability, so just landing your abilities on a target brings extra free damage along with it.

abilities.name: Darkin Daggers
abilities.howToUseIt: Throw a dagger to apply bleed, then throw the second for bonus damage if the target is already bleeding - hitting a champion or monster also sends your packmates to leap onto that target.

abilities.name: The Call of the Pack
abilities.howToUseIt: Use this to become untargetable and summon more packmates before or during a fight, giving yourself extra damage and speed to close a gap or ride out incoming burst.

abilities.name: Eviscerate
abilities.howToUseIt: Dash through enemies to deal damage and pull your packmates back to your side, fully healing them - use it to top your pack back up before the next fight.

abilities.name: Hounds' Pursuit
abilities.howToUseIt: Dash at a priority target with your whole pack for a big burst of damage; if you get the kill, recast to dash again and gain a shield, letting you chain onto the next target.

earlyGamePlan: Look for chances to throw Darkin Daggers onto the enemy laner to apply bleed and bring your packmates into the fight, then follow up with a second dagger for bonus damage. Play patiently before level 6, since Hounds' Pursuit is what turns your all-ins into real kill threats.
quickTips: Land your first dagger before committing - it applies bleed and sets up the second dagger's bonus damage.
Use The Call of the Pack to survive incoming burst by turning untargetable at the right moment.
Save Hounds' Pursuit for isolated priority targets like the enemy carry, not the frontmost tank.
Eviscerate heals your packmates, so use it to top them back up between skirmishes.
Recast Hounds' Pursuit right after a kill to chain onto another low-health target.
whatToExpect: Naafiri will look for picks on isolated targets, using Hounds' Pursuit to dive in with her whole pack for a burst of damage. Killing her packmates quickly with area damage cuts into her overall damage, and since she's a squishy assassin, punishing her dive with crowd control or burst of your own is usually enough to turn the fight around.

glossary.definition: Damage dealt gradually over time by certain abilities.
A large amount of damage dealt very quickly.
Cannot be targeted by enemy abilities or attacks for a duration.
Catching and killing an isolated enemy champion, usually setting up an advantage before a teamfight.
A damage-focused champion a team leans on for late-game damage.
Committing all your damage and cooldowns to try to kill an enemy right now.
Effects like stuns, roots, or slows that limit an enemy's ability to move or act.
